LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LAW OFFICE OF DANIEL D. MURPHY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF MARIA ISTEL' IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B, NOR ARE THE PAPERS SCANNED ON THE COURT'S COMPUTER SYSTEM. FURTHER, IT APPEARS FROM THE PROOF OF SERVICE THAT THE MOTION SHOULD BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE PER CCP 1005, WHICH REQUIRES AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS FOR NOTICE OF HEARING, PLUS FIVE CALENDAR DAYS IF SERVED BY MAIL. THE PROOF OF SERVICE STATES THAT THE PAPERS WERE SERVED BY MAIL ON DECEMBER 3, 2013. IF APPLICANT WISHES TO GO FORWARD WITH THE HEARING, ATTORNEY MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL OF THE MOVING PAPERS BY 9:15 A.M. ON DECEMBER 26, 2013, AND, IF POSSIBLE, SEND AN ELECTRONIC COPY TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

AMENDED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling at 9:35 a.m.
THE LAW OFFICE OF DANIEL D. MURPHY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF MARIA ISTEL' IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. The Court does not have courtesy copies of the moving papers, as required by Local Rule 2.6B, nor are the papers scanned on the Court's computer system. Further, it appears from the proof of service that the motion should be taken off calendar for insufficient service per CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing, plus five calendar days if served by mail. The proof of service states that the papers were served by mail on December 3, 2013. If applicant wishes to go forward with the hearing, attorney must provide courtesy copies of all of the moving papers by 9:15 a.m. on December 26, 2013, and, if possible, send an electronic copy to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
